Now

What I am building and tightening right now.

This page stays short on purpose. It is a snapshot of the work that currently has my attention.

Current bias

Less noise, more systems that can be trusted under imperfect operating conditions.

Currently building SuperFIB dashboard v4

Signal board reconciliation, clearer operator state, and tighter dashboard behavior around execution visibility.

Currently building Stokvel Society

Core product features, stronger reporting flow, and final interface hardening around community finance clarity.

Currently hardening Data integrity and feed reliability

Staleness handling, source alignment, and the boring checks that keep distributed systems from quietly drifting.

SS Developers
